mapper.select: SELECT report_id AS reportId, target_type AS targetType, target_id AS targetId, status, TO_CHAR(created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS createdAt, reporter_nickname AS reporterNickname, reporter_handle AS reporterHandle, content FROM vw_reports_admin WHERE target_account_id = #{accountId} ORDER BY status ASC, created_at DESC

SELECT r.report_id AS reportId, r.target_type AS targetType, r.target_id AS targetId, r.status AS status, TO_CHAR(r.created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS createdAt, r.content AS content, d.nickname AS reporterNickname, d.handle AS reporterHandle FROM reports r JOIN vw_account_display d ON d.account_id = r.reporter_account_id WHERE r.target_type = #{targetType} AND r.target_id = #{targetId} ORDER BY r.created_at DESC
